message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate comparison.zig helpers to builder API

Migrates comparison helper functions to use auto-close patterns:
- emitStrEql/emitStrNotEql use withParensCtx
- emitBinCmp delegates to emitBinOp
- emitPyAnyEql, emitSetEqual use withParensCtx
- emitStrContains/emitStrNotContains use nested withParensCtx
- emitComplexEql uses emitParens for both operands
